title: [Seq] Potential issue in python bindings test?

features.name: sv.reg without name causing export error
features.description: Code should include an sv.reg operation with an empty or missing name attribute that triggers validation error during Verilog export

features.name: always_ff with unnamed sv.reg storage
features.description: Code should include an always_ff process block that uses an sv.reg as storage, where the sv.reg has no name attribute
